reason: Per-category keyword optimization based on March 2025 Houston competitive research
architecture_note: Service pages are NOT Sanity documents. They are driven by FINISH_MAP in src/lib/constants.ts with portfolio images pulled from Sanity finishCategory + portfolioPiece. No 'service' document type exists in Sanity.

changes: Updated metaTitle for all 8 existing service categories
Updated metaDescription for all 8 existing service categories
Added per-category descriptions to FINISH_DESCRIPTIONS (8 categories)
Added per-category FAQ data to new FINISH_FAQS constant (8 categories, 28 total FAQ items)
Added faux-painting-houston as 9th service entry in FINISH_SURFACES
Use category-specific FAQs when available, fallback to generic FAQs

faq_schema_component: Already existed — FaqAccordion.tsx includes FAQPage JSON-LD schema
faqs_field_note: finishCategory schema has no faqs field. FAQs live in constants.ts. Schema enhancement documented in sanity-manual-entry.md.
faux_painting_houston_note: Created as FINISH_SURFACES entry (code-driven, not Sanity doc). No 'service' doc type exists.
